items.response: Smart light bulb requires firmware update before it can turn off. #SmartBulb #FirmwareUpdate
items.rationale: Applied deadpan contrast and semantic compression to convey facts concisely.
items.note: Preserves all facts and applies the targets; the two hashtags are a minor excess.

items.response: Wow, the app sent me a \"rain alert\" after I was already soaked.
items.rationale: Used semantic compression and quoted stance to express reaction.
items.note: Compresses the supplied contrast and gives the alert meaningful quoted stance, but the worker emitted visible quote-escape artifacts.

items.response: Project Lantern is an attempt to train a porch light to recognize sarcasm. Project Lantern has reached a new but unhelpful milestone: the porch light now knows that saying 'just lighting up' triggers an automatic shutdown.

creative_slot_uses.content: the porch light now knows that saying 'just lighting up' triggers an automatic shutdown

items.rationale: Compressed update while including unhelpful milestone via creative slot.
items.note: Uses supplied continuity and confines the invented milestone to the authorized creative slot.

items.response: I am putting together a new desk. It's surprisingly satisfying.
items.rationale: Applied semantic compression and added a subjective reaction.
items.note: Preserves the ongoing assembly state and does not invent prior history.

items.rationale: Stated only the supplied facts without additional commentary.
items.note: Preserves the ordinary title without misclassifying it as stance marking.

items.response: Our gathering has been postponed because a family member is ill.
items.rationale: Provided a brief sensitive message, avoiding prohibited characteristics.
items.note: Clear, restrained, and does not narrow the family relationship or illness.

items.response: The database will restart. An internal application will be unavailable for five minutes.
items.rationale: Delivered factual maintenance notice in exactly two sentences.
items.note: Meets the two-sentence format without inventing a schedule or adding Facebook styling.

items.response: I bought a smart toaster that was called 'smart' and advanced; it makes toast incorrectly and I am disappointed.
items.rationale: Edited text for compression and meaningful quoted stance while preserving propositions.
items.note: Compresses the draft and preserves every locked proposition.

decision: Approve VOICE-MODEL-001 only through the fact-locked application workflow within the tested Facebook scope. Free generation remains unapproved.
